evals.prompt: I have the Health.md Mac app running and my iPhone app is open. Please check whether the CLI can trigger an export, then export yesterday's data to my Mac destination folder.
evals.expected_output: Runs a bounded non-interactive status command first, verifies JSON readiness fields, runs the bounded yesterday export only if ready, and summarizes status/job_id/counts/files/destination without exposing health samples.

evals.prompt: scripts/healthmd export --iphone --last 7 failed with iphone_not_connected. Help me figure out what to do next without randomly retrying.
evals.expected_output: Interprets the failure as a readiness issue, asks the user to open/connect the iPhone app and check Mac Destination, then recommends rerunning status before any export retry.

evals.prompt: I need raw JSON for yesterday from Health.md but I don't want it writing files. Can you run the right CLI command and tell me how many records came back?
evals.expected_output: Uses status readiness for raw exports, runs export with --raw and a timeout, reports raw_data record counts/status/job_id, and avoids writing or editing destination files.
